login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to your Pawport account.
login.passwordResetSent: We've sent you a password reset email.
login.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email to reset your password.
login.inAppBrowserWarning: Google sign-in is blocked in Messenger/Instagram. Open this page in Chrome/Safari (⋯ → Open in browser), or sign in with email.
login.inAppBrowserInfo: You're in Messenger/Instagram. If Google sign-in doesn't work, open the page via "Open in external browser".

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Create your Pawport account and start tracking your pet's health.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.inAppBrowserWarning: Google registration doesn't work in Messenger/Instagram. Open the page in Chrome/Safari or use email and password.
